---
title: "Aunt Charlotte's Evenings at Home with the Poets"
sort_title: "Aunt Charlotte's Evenings at Home with the Poets"
year: 1881
subtitle: "1881"
slug: "Aunt Charlotte's evenings at home with the poets"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
---

**Click here for an Oxford Bodleian Library 1881 edition of***[Aunt Charlotte's evenings at home with the poets](http://ia340904.us.archive.org/0/items/auntcharlottese00yonggoog/)***in various formats  
The PDF file is very clear but cannot be searched.  
The TXT file can be searched but has many errors and is difficult to read.**

[](http://ia340904.us.archive.org/0/items/auntcharlottese00yonggoog/)
